text:
Once upon a time, in a small quiet town called Willowbrook, there lived an adorable little kitten named Whiskers.

Whiskers loved nothing more than playing with feathers. Every dawn, he would sneak out of his cozy house into the garden and hunt the brilliant blue ones that fluttered in the sun.

One morning, while Whiskers was chasing his favorite feather, he accidentally kicked it into Mr. Jenkins' hatbox. Panicked, Whiskers darted back home as fast as his little paws could carry him.

Mr. Jenkins noticed his new feather toy missing later that day. He searched everywhere, finally hanging it on a branch outside Whiskers' window. That day, they became lifelong friends.

Every year on that branch, Whiskers would nod reverently towards the feather. Mr. Jenkins would laugh every time.
